title: Y@gar #3026
definition:
Jegar-sahadutha = "witness heap"

 1) the mound of stones raised as witness between Jacob and Laban,
    called by Jacob in Hebrew 'Galeed'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jegar-sahadutha = "witness heap"

 1) the mound of stones raised as witness between Jacob and Laban,
    called by Jacob in Hebrew 'Galeed'

    NASB:  heap (of stones) of the testimony,  a memorial of Jacob and Laban
